description: Active geopolitical situations driving prediction market demand. Updated each RESEARCH scan.

active_situations.name: US-Iran War / Strait of Hormuz Crisis
active_situations.summary: Day 31 (March 30 evening). ESCALATION UPDATE: Trump posted new ultimatum on Truth Social March 30 - if Hormuz not reopened 'shortly,' US will destroy all Iranian power plants, oil wells, Kharg Island, and desalination plants. Iran demands Lebanon ceasefire be bundled with any Iran deal. Pakistan direct-talks window expired with no contact. No US-Iran direct talks since war began. Brent peaked $126/bbl, currently $101.89. April 6 binary outcome remains the key prediction market event this week.

key_upcoming_dates.event: Trump's deadline for Iran energy infrastructure strikes OR peace deal. Binary outcome: strikes or ceasefire.
key_upcoming_dates.prediction_market_impact: critical - either outcome generates new markets

active_situations.prediction_market_demand: critical - highest since Ukraine war started

active_situations.name: Ukraine-Russia War
active_situations.summary: Year 4 of conflict. Peace talks stalled as US attention diverted to Iran. 96% Polymarket odds of no ceasefire by March 31.
active_situations.prediction_market_demand: medium - lower than Iran war but persistent

active_situations.name: Venezuela Post-Maduro
active_situations.summary: Maduro seized Jan 3 by US forces. 66% odds Delcy Rodriguez leads by end 2026.
active_situations.prediction_market_demand: medium - lower volume, but ongoing political uncertainty

active_situations.name: US 2026 Midterm Elections
active_situations.summary: Markets already active. $4.1M Balance of Power market on Polymarket. Conditional markets launched March 2026. Volume expected to surge 6-9 months before November.
active_situations.prediction_market_demand: growing - Polymarket reported 15% WoW growth on conditional election markets since February

active_situations.name: NYC Mayoral Election
active_situations.summary: $150M+ in prediction market volume. Largest single election market to date.

active_situations.name: US Tariffs & Trade War
active_situations.summary: Largest US tax increase since 1993 ($1,500/household). IEEPA tariffs ruled unlawful by Supreme Court early 2026, being replaced with Section 122/301/232. New Section 301 investigations (March 11) targeting China, EU, Korea, Vietnam, Thailand. Supreme Court tariff ruling odds: 28-32% Trump wins.

key_upcoming_dates.prediction_market_impact: high - binary outcome affecting 1/3 of military budget

active_situations.apac_impact: Section 301 investigations target Korea, Vietnam, Thailand - XMarket's primary markets. Creates both risk and prediction market demand.
